---
title: "Lucy Hutchinson"
---

## Lucy Hutchinson

**Dates:** (1620-1681)

**Maiden name:** (Apsley)

### Description

biographer

### Biography

She was the subject of a biography by the \'author of Magdalen Stafford\' in the first series of <i>Biographies of Good Women</i> (1862).

### Letters

- Letter from March 18th 1861
- Letter from Decr 4th 1860

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
